positive: A vibrant, stylized celestial forest scene. The foreground features geometric, bioluminescent flora forming natural arches and glowing pathways. Towering, stylized trees with abstract, crystalline canopies dominate the composition. Small, ethereal, geometric creatures (like glowing moths or winged sprites) flit among the branches. The overall mood is mystic and whimsical. Composition is centered and highly symmetrical, ideal for placement on a t-shirt or mug. Use a limited, complementary color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, vibrant magenta, and neon lime. Strong volumetric lighting with dramatic contrast, giving a sharp, clean silhouette feel against a dark background. Vector illustration style mixed with high-detail digital painting, high resolution, seamless repeat pattern potential.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, low detail, watermark, signature, extra limbs, poor anatomy, grayscale, photorealism, sketch, messy, cluttered, bad edges, dirty
